_note: ZABAL Gamez bounty board - open bounties anyone can claim. Each bounty is real (POIDH on Base) or a community task. Fields: title, type (clip|ad|build|task), reward (display string), brief (one line on what wins), poidh_url (the on-chain bounty, optional), claim_url (where to submit), deadline (YYYY-MM-DD or null for rolling), status auto-derives: a past deadline reads 'closed', else 'open'. Add a bounty by appending to bounties[]. The clip bounties are created per-recording via the on-chain widget (see /recordings) - this board is the front door + the curated big ones.

bounties.title: The ZABAL Gamez Open Pot
bounties.brief: Submit a build for the ZAO ecosystem during July - anyone who submits shares the open pot. Add to it, or claim from it.

bounties.title: Clip a workshop recording
bounties.brief: Cut a 45-60s clip of any ZABAL Gamez recording and submit it for the bounty on that recording. Best clip wins the pot - and anyone can add to it.

past.title: Best ad for ZABAL Gamez
past.brief: Make the best ad for ZABAL Gamez - any format. The winning clip became the pinned promo.
